meta.description: On-demand diploma-style completion CERTIFICATE generator (template-driven, no AI). Trigger via Telegram (/certificate <name>) or manually (form: recipient, course, date, optional ID). Render builds a landscape A4 certificate (CLIENT_NAME branding, unique ID); Gotenberg renders the PDF to /reports/awareness/certificates and returns it. Pairs with the quiz / e-learning module.

parameters.formDescription: Enter the recipient and course. A diploma-style PDF certificate is generated.
